content:
💡 gpt_image_2_skill | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a collection of effective prompts and an integrated toolset (CLI and agent skill) for generating and editing images using OpenAI's GPT Image 2 model.
✨ Key Features: • GPT Image 2 prompt gallery and library • Agentic skill for AI agents (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) • CLI for image generation and editing • Reusable prompts for various use cases (research figures, UI mockups, etc.) • Focus on curated examples for quality and demonstration
📖 Summary: This repository provides a curated gallery of prompts for OpenAI's GPT Image 2, serving as a prompt library and an agentic skill. It also includes a Command Line Interface (CLI) for image generation and editing, designed for use with skill-capable agent runtimes.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
